revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Fuchimori Inari Shrine
| native_name = 淵森稲荷社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Fuchimori Inari Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|35.243715|136.739882}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Inari Ōkami|lt=Inari|ar|إناري|az|İnari Okami|ban|Inari (Kami)|bcl|Inari Ōkami|ca|Oinari|cs|Inari (mytologie)|da|Inari|de|Inari (Kami)|el|Ινάρι Όκαμι|en|Inari Ōkami|es|Inari (Japón)|et|Inari (jumal)|eu|Inari Ōkami|fa|ایناری|fi|Inari (kami)|fr|Inari (divinité japonaise)|hr|Inari|hu|Inari (sintó)|hy|Ինարի Օկամի|id|Inari (Kami)|it|Inari (mitologia)|ja|稲荷神|jv|Inari (Kami)|ko|이나리노카미|mni|ꯏꯅꯔꯤ ꯑꯣꯀꯃꯤ|nl|Inari Ōkami|no|Inari|pl|Inari (bóstwo)|pt|Inari Ōkami|ru|Инари (божество)|simple|Inari Ōkami|sl|Inari (mitologija)|sr|Инари (богиња)|sv|Inari|tr|Inari Ōkami|uk|Інарі (міфологія)|vi|Inari Ōkami|zh|稻荷神|qid=Q719665|1=Inari Ōkami}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Fuchimori Inari Shrine'''|淵森稲荷社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q514480|ltq=Q514480|qid=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}}
** Series ordinal: 34
** P155: {{ill|Q135039482|ltq=Q135039482|qid=Q135039482|1=Shihoeno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Munakatano Shrine|lt=Munakatano Shrine|qid=Q135098958|1=Munakatano Shrine (Q135098958)}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q514506|ltq=Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}}
* {{ill|Q780420|ltq=Q780420|qid=Q780420|1=Nakashima district}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.243715|136.739882}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Q719665|ltq=Q719665|qid=Q719665|1=Inari Ōkami}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181374
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135039483|ltq=Q135039483|qid=Q135039483|1=Fuchino Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
